videos.title: This Colorado Mountain Is Hollow
videos.description: In this episode of Recon America, I'm exploring the Bachelor Loop above Creede, Colorado — the last great silver boomtown in the state. This 17-mile trail winds through what's left of a mining district that produced a billion dollars' worth of silver at today's prices: the massive Commodore Mine with its 200 miles of tunnels, abandoned townsites where hundreds of people lived at 10,000 feet, and a few surprises along the way — including a moose, a locked gate, and a fire station you have to see

videos.description:
📍 Download onX Offroad to try for FREE — https://bit.ly/4h0stAr 🔥 Use Code: CASEY250 for a discount

Raptor Rooftop Rentals - https://bit.ly/4vxzlgH

I took the Ford Ranger Raptor into the Canadian Rockies during the worst weather I have ever experienced. Between the relentless torrential rain and the infamous 'Alberta Grease' mud, the trails at McLean Creek were completely flooded.

In this video, we put the Raptor’s off-road tech to the ultimate test. Can it handle water crossing over the hood

videos.title: What is Azure Arc? Monitor, Manage & Secure SQL Server Anywhere
videos.description:
Azure Arc gives you a single control plane for managing SQL Server instances across on-premises, Azure, AWS, and other environments—without migrating them.

In this video, you'll learn how Azure Arc helps DBAs monitor performance, improve security, automate management tasks, and simplify SQL Server migrations from one central location. 

If your SQL Servers are scattered across multiple clouds and data centers, Azure Arc can bring them together into a unified management experience. Patrick LeBla

videos.title: The Power BI Expert Is GONE. Now What?
videos.description:
Learn how Copilot for Power BI semantic models helps you understand existing business logic, document measures, and safely extend models when the original developer isn't available.

Every Power BI semantic model contains critical business knowledge, calculations, and assumptions that are often locked inside the head of the person who built it. This walkthrough follows a real-world scenario where a report owner needs to update an executive dashboard without access to the original model author.

videos.title: How AI Changes if Open Source Gets Banned
videos.description: Potential Chinese limits on overseas distribution of open-weight models could recast frontier AI as a national security asset and reshape global model access. Consequences for token efficiency and cost structures point toward heavier reliance on post-training tuning, lightweight open models, and proprietary alternatives. Coverage includes GPT 5.6 and Fable 5 comparisons, SpaceXAI's Grok 4.5, Meta's Muse Image, Microsoft's Frontier Tuning, and the rise of model routers to balance capability, cost

videos.title: The one question that tells you if your role is safe #AI #careers #AIjobs #jobs #tech
videos.description:
It is an uncomfortable question, and it is the fastest way to see your own risk clearly. If the honest answer is no, then a lot of what you do is coordination, and coordination is the first thing that gets cut when an organization gets leaner, because agents and better internal tooling absorb it first.

The move is not to panic. It is to migrate toward work that creates direct value. Look for ways to ring the cash register. Build things customers actually touch. Get closer to revenue and to the

videos.title: When everyone can code, this is what's scarce #AI #careers #AIjobs #coding #tech
videos.description:
When code costs almost nothing to produce, writing it stops being the scarce skill. The person who writes it isn't the center of gravity anymore, and neither is the person reviewing the pull request, because an agent is about to do that too.The role that actually matters sits in the middle. 

Someone has to take a vague business need and turn it into a spec precise enough to direct a machine, and then have the judgment to look at what comes back and know whether it actually solves the problem fo

items.title: OneDrive: PDF annotation for sensitivity-label protected PDFs in the OneDrive apps (iOS and Android)
items.description: The Microsoft OneDrive apps for iOS and Android will let users annotate PDFs protected by a Microsoft Purview Information Protection sensitivity label that applies encryption — without removing or weakening the label. Users with edit/annotate rights can add a full set of annotations — including ink, highlight, free text, notes, signatures, image/shape/date stamps, bookmarks, and form fields — directly in the OneDrive mobile PDF viewer; the file's encryption and usage rights are preserved end to

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Insider Risk Management - DS Triage Agent for IRM available in Defender
items.description:
We’re introducing support for Insider Risk Management (IRM) alert agent summaries within Microsoft Defender, enabling investigators to access key triage insights directly in the Defender alert queue.
When the IRM Triage Agent is active, IRM alerts surfaced in Microsoft Defender will now include the agent summary—such as agent categorization, investigation summary, identified risk patterns, and relevant user details—helping analysts quickly assess alert severity without leaving their existing Def

items.title: OneDrive: Exclude specific folders from syncing
items.description: OneDrive for Windows and Mac will let users exclude specific folders from syncing, so folders that do not belong in the cloud, such as developer tooling folders like PowerShell modules, Visual Studio configuration, and node modules, stay local on the device instead of uploading to OneDrive. Administrators can define folder exclusion rules for their organization.

items.title: Minecraft Education: Learning Cubed Update with Cross-Tenant Multiplayer and Latest Bedrock Features
items.description: The Learning Cubed Update introduces cross-tenant multiplayer for dedicated servers and key features from the latest Bedrock updates.

items.title: SharePoint: Create new workflows with Copilot in SharePoint
items.description: Describe a workflow intent such as "when files are set to status = Complete, post a message in my Teams chat" and Copilot in SharePoint will assemble the necessary triggers, conditions, and actions to setup your workflow. You can come back to Copilot in SharePoint at any time to make changes or click "Workflows" from the command bar to see your live workflow.

items.title: Microsoft 365 app: New Copilot Notebooks design in the Microsoft 365 Copilot App (Android)
items.description: Copilot Notebooks in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app (Android) now lets users organize related chats, output creations, and references into a persistent AI workspace. Copilot uses the Notebook's accumulated context to ground responses, so work continues across sessions instead of starting over each time.

items.title: Thumbnail view for PDFs is available in OneDrive and SharePoint on the web
items.description:
We are improving PDF navigation in OneDrive and SharePoint on the web by adding a thumbnail view in the PDF viewer. Users will be able to open a thumbnail panel to visually browse pages in a PDF and jump directly to a selected page.
This update helps users navigate long PDFs more quickly, especially when they need to find a visual section, page layout, chart, image, or form page without scrolling page by page.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention - Collection and DLP Policies for Intune-Policy Managed Apps
items.description: We are introducing a new integrated Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention (DLP) capability for Intune Mobile Application Management (MAM)-protected mobile apps, enabling organizations to apply content‑aware protection policies to sensitive data on mobile devices. This integration ensures that clipboard actions in managed mobile apps are evaluated against Purview DLP policies before sharing is allowed, helping reduce data leakage, insider risk, and exposure to advanced threats across mobile work

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Specify who has control of production tools in Teams meetings and events
items.description: A new meeting option for Teams meetings with presenters and events that enables organizers to designate 'Who has control of production tools' during the event. Users defined here will have access to the controls in 'Manage What Attendees See' and the ‘Green Room'.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Ability for IT admins to customize the user notification messages for recording and transcription in calls
items.description: This feature enables IT admins to customize a portion of the user notification messages for recording and transcription during Teams calls.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: New controls for quick views in the chat list
items.description: The new chats and channels experience introduced quick views at the top of the chat and channels list. These are views into mentions, followed threads and more. This update allows users to choose when and how these quick views are shown. Users will have options such as always show, always hide and show only when unread. Users will also be able to collapse the quick views section.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics - Insights in Cowork and WorkIQ spend and usage
items.description: Insights into AI spend (Copilot credit usage) at a group or team level will be available in Viva Insights as a dashboard and in Advanced insights. The services in scope of this release are Cowork and Work IQ API. The dashboard experience is available to managers with at least 5 direct reports (scoped access), the Insights analysts, and Global administrators and is enabled by default to ensure immediate access to usage-based cost insights. For users to be able to use Cowork or WorkIQ API, your te

items.title: Outlook: Improved PDF Preview on iOS
items.description: MIP-label protected PDFs are now supported in the PDF previewer along with a built-in control's toolbar for easier navigation.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention – Enrich Defender alerts Graph API with DLP event data
items.description: Enhance current API infrastructure to provide easy and simple way for customers to export data to integrate with SIEM tools, create automated workflows and generate customizable reports. Today alert data is present in Graph API and DLP rule match event details are present in Management API. This work enriches the graph API with DLP event data to make correlation and integration easy for customers.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Branded footer in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app
items.description: This update introduces a co-branding experience in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app that helps organizations present an admin approved visual identifier directly within the Chat screen. Specifically, the experience enables administrators to leverage the organization-supported logo already managed in the Microsoft Admin Center theming settings and display it in the footer of the Chat screen, paired with a fixed label: “Approved by”.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Improved content freshness using Copilot connectors with webhooks-led notifications
items.description: Copilot connectors will offer improved content freshness with more frequent sync of updates using webhook event notifications. The following connectors are in scope - Azure DevOps, Jira cloud, Confluence cloud, Trello, Asana, Bitbucket, GitHub and Gitlab.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Enhanced delegated calling with delegate call access restrictions and join notifications
items.description: Call delegation in Teams now includes new controls that give delegators greater privacy and control during active calls. Delegators can lock an ongoing call to prevent delegates from joining or resuming the call and can optionally enable warning tones that notify participants when a delegate joins or resumes a call.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Support for MCP Agents with Interactive UI Widgets in Government Clouds
items.description: Feature description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) based agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat will now be able to surface rich, interactive UI widgets directly within chat. This enhancement enables developers to deliver more engaging and structured agent interactions. Users will experience these widgets when interacting with agents that implement them, and admins will continue to manage these agents through the Microsoft 365 Admin Center.

items.title: Outlook: Co-Authoring Highlight and Rewrite
items.description: Users can now collaborate with Copilot to make improvements to email drafts. Select a section of the draft and ask Copilot to make changes, like changing its length, tone, or structure.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Interpreter - Simultaneous mode enhancements
items.description: We’re raising the bar on clarity and control with Interpreter. Admins can fully disable voice simulation via PowerShell when needed. Each speaker is automatically assigned a distinct voice, making multi-speaker conversations easier to follow. We’re reducing distractions by showing shimmer effects only to Interpreter users. We’ve added audio notifications to confirm activation, and we’ve introduced in-product feedback mechanisms so users can easily share their input.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention for Microsoft 365 Copilot to safeguard prompts for government clouds
items.description: We are expanding Microsoft Purview DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot to safeguard prompts containing sensitive data. This real-time control helps organizations mitigate data leakage and oversharing risks by preventing Microsoft 365 Copilot and agents from returning a response when prompts contain sensitive data or using that sensitive data for grounding in Microsoft 365 or the web. This capability currently extends to Microsoft 365 Copilot and agents built in Copilot Studio that are published to Mic

items.title: Microsoft Viva: New Overview experience in Agent Dashboard
items.description: Customers can now view and understand their agent landscape through the new Overview page that will be included as part of the Agent Dashboard in Microsoft Viva. This experience will provide customers with key at-a-glance insights on adoption in their organizations and visibility into who’s creating agents used in their organization.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Recent feed in Viva Engage
items.description: Introducing a new “Recent” feed in Home to give users a more predictable view of followed and priority communications, while preserving the existing personalized “For you” experience.

items.title: Planner: Microsoft Planner tab support for shared and private channels in Microsoft Teams
items.description: Now you can add Microsoft Planner as a tab in shared and private channels in Microsoft Teams, which allows to create and manage tasks directly within the channel.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Deep citations in Copilot
items.description: Deep citations let users quickly verify Copilot's results by linking directly to the relevant part of the reference, boosting trust. We're starting with Word and PPT files, then adding Meetings, Web, and PDF references.

items.title: Viva Engage: My Team audiences and flexible targeting for leader communications
items.description: We’re introducing more flexible and precise targeting capabilities in Viva Engage, starting with Storyline Announcements. This new feature allows leaders and their delegates to define a custom audience at the time of posting, without relying on pre-configured Leader Audiences. Audiences can be built, and saved for reuse, using organizational attributes such as department, job title, or country, existing groups like M365 Groups, distribution lists, or security groups, and even individual users by

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Endpoint Data Loss Prevention-Endpoint DLP support classification of Azure RMS protected Office documents
items.description: Endpoint DLP can now classify Office files stored in Windows devices that have Azure RMS protection applied.  Classification will be triggered when file is used in applications or when just-in-time classification is enabled.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Agent Mode in Word for Enhanced document editing
items.description: Copilot supports document editing in Word through chat-based interactions with Agent Mode. Users can initiate edits, share clarifying directions, and review a summary of changes within the document.

items.title: Microsoft 365: Create full-workload backup policies for Microsoft 365 Backup
items.description: Automatically backup all Exchange or OneDrive users and/or SharePoint sites in the tenant and have the tool automatically add new users/sites to the backup policy.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: SharePoint app in Teams
items.description: When a user who has access to the SharePoint app in Teams clicks a SharePoint page or news link in Teams chat or channels, the link will open inside the SharePoint app in Teams (if available) instead of the mobile browser

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Link meetings to CRM records automatically with AI
items.description: This feature saves you time by automatically connecting your meetings to the correct CRM records. You have the right deal insights at your fingertips when preparing for customer conversations, so you can focus less on updating records and more on selling with confidence and context.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Enrich Sales agent meeting prep with more data sources
items.description: Walking into a customer meeting with incomplete context can mean missed risks, overlooked issues, and conversations that fall flat. With access to richer data, like service tickets, directly in your meeting prep, you can spot open issues and opportunities before the conversation starts. This insight helps you engage more meaningfully, build stronger relationships, and drive better sales outcomes.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Add custom insights to record summaries in Sales agent
items.description: Sales agent gives you strong CRM-based account and opportunity summaries, but important context is often spread across non-CRM systems. With this capability, you can add insights from any application to enrich account and opportunity summaries in Sales agent, so sellers get a unified view of their accounts and deals in one place without switching applications.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Engage customers across multiple channels (web, voice, SMS & email)
items.description: A multi‑channel outreach capability, spanning web chat, voice, SMS, and email, is critical for meeting customers in the channel they naturally prefer and increasing the likelihood of timely engagement. By activating the agent across multiple surfaces, we ensure continuity of conversations, reduce drop‑off when a single channel fails, and support the FY27 goal of always‑on, end‑to‑end engagement from initial intent to close. This creates higher response rates, faster qualification, and a more sea

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Engage prospects faster with Sales Agent-enriched leads
items.description:
To reach their sales goals, sales teams need to constantly generate enough pipeline. They need to decide which inbound leads to engage. This decision takes a lot of time because sellers must sift through large amounts of data across tools and data sources. This data includes information from internal systems like their CRM and external resources like the web and third-party data services.
Sales Agent handles the work of reviewing every available data source to create a comprehensive summary for
